title: Crowdstrike Holdings 1Q results beat estimates; stock falls as growth slows
text: Crowdstrike Holdings Inc has announced that its first-quarter 2024 total revenue rose 42% year over year to $692.6 million, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $674.3 million but less than the 61% growth the company generated during the same period last year. The cybersecurity provider also recorded non-GAAP net income of $0.57 per diluted share for the period, which also beat the $0.50 expectation.

title: CrowdStrike Reports First Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Financial Results
text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWD), a global cybersecurity leader that provides cloud-delivered protection of endpoints, cloud workloads, identity and data, today announced financial results for the first quarter fiscal year 2024, ended April 30, 2023. “CrowdStrike's first quarter results exceeded our guided metrics and reached new financial milestones, delivering the winning combination of growth, profitability and free cash flow at scale,” said George Ku.

title: CrowdStrike Achieves IL5 Authorization to Secure U.S. Department of Defense
text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CrowdStrike (Nasdaq: CRWD) today announced that it has been granted an Impact Level 5 (IL5) Provisional Authorization (PA) from the United States Department of Defense (DoD). A broad range of DoD unclassified National Security Systems (NSS) can now deploy the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform to protect mission-critical data. The U.S. DoD uses an Impact Level classification system to authorize cybersecurity technology, with IL5 being the highest level of authorization.
